items.title: Introduction to The Final Testament
items.author: Rashad Khalifa
items.author_evidence: Signed 'Rashad Khalifa / Tucson / Ramadan 26, 1409' at end of essay
items.notes: Substantive theological introduction to Khalifa's Quran translation. Covers cosmology, Satan's rebellion, the Code-19 miracle.

items.title: All 38 Appendices to The Final Testament
items.author: Rashad Khalifa
items.author_evidence: Inventoried from /quran/appendices/ index; all attributed to Khalifa as Appendices to his translation

urls.title: Why Was the Quran Revealed in Arabic?
God's Usage of the Plural Tense
Two False Verses Removed from the Quran
Muhammad Wrote God's Revelations With His Own Hand
Why Did God Send a Messenger Now?
Virginity/Chastity: A Trait of the True Believers

items.notes: Appendix 24 (Two False Verses Removed) is where Khalifa flags 9:128-9:129. Surface this Appendix in the corpus, but the runtime rule still forbids the app surfacing the verses themselves.

items.title: Quran, Hadith and Islam
items.author: Rashad Khalifa, Ph.D.
items.author_evidence: Title page byline: 'By: Rashad Khalifa, Ph.D.' on /publications/books/qhi/contents.html
items.url_pattern: QURAN_Hadith_Islam_pg{N}.pdf for N in 1..89, plus QURAN_Hadith_Islam_TitlePage.pdf, QURAN_Hadith_Islam_CopyRightPg.pdf, QURAN_Hadith_Islam_Preface.pdf, rear_cover.html
items.notes: 89 chapters as individual PDFs averaging ~187 KB each (chapter 1 sample-verified). Single consolidated HTML may be preferred for ingestion. Alt mirror on submission.ws if primary fetch fails.

items.title: Quran: Visual Presentation of the Miracle
items.author: Rashad Khalifa
items.author_evidence: Title page byline: 'By: Rashad Khalifa'; published 1982 by Islamic Productions, 739 E 6th Street, Tucson AZ
items.url_pattern: fact{NN}.pdf for NN in 01..52, plus front_matter.pdf, introduction.pdf, corrections.pdf, summary_and_conclusions.pdf, book_cover.pdf
items.notes: Heavily diagrammatic; relies on visual presentation of Code-19 patterns. Text extraction will lose figures. PDFs gated behind /publications/books/vp/ 'I Agree' page — must inspect copyright text before bulk fetch (Open Question #1).

items.title: The Computer Speaks: God's Message to the World
items.author: Rashad Khalifa
items.author_evidence: Title page byline: 'By: Rashad Khalifa'; published 1982 by Islamic Productions, 739 E 6th Street, Tucson AZ
items.url_pattern: fact{NN}.pdf for NN in 01..31, plus cover, copyright, prologue, summary_and_conclusions, lessons_from_quran PDFs
items.notes: Same gating pattern as VP — copyright agreement must be inspected first.

items.title: Submitters Perspective (Khalifa-editorship era only)
items.author: Rashad Khalifa, Ph.D. (Editor; many issues fully bylined to him)
items.author_evidence: Sample-verified 1989/jan/page1.html byline reads 'Editor: Rashad Khalifa, Ph.D.'; archive index explicitly states he edited until martyrdom 1990-01-31; March 1990 issue published in advance
items.url_pattern: {YYYY}/{mmm}/page{P}.html where mmm = lowercase 3-letter month abbreviation, P in 1..4 (most issues 4 pages)
items.khalifa_primary_caveat: Khalifa edited all 64 issues. Lead articles typically bylined to him. Some shorter pieces in each issue may be from other contributors (letters, community notices). The scrape session should preserve byline metadata per-article so non-Khalifa-bylined snippets can be filtered downstream.
items.notes: Post-1990-03 SP issues (April 1990 onwards through 2026) are community-edited and EXCLUDED from primary corpus per binding rule.

excluded_items.title: Proclamation
excluded_items.reason: Authored by United Submitters International / Masjid Tucson as organization, not Khalifa-bylined

excluded_items.title: All Lisa Spray books
examples: Women's Rights, the Quran and Islam

excluded_items.title: Understanding Islam
excluded_items.author: Masjid Tucson Submitters
excluded_items.reason: Community-authored; collective Masjid Tucson byline, not Khalifa-bylined

excluded_items.title: Submitters Perspective April 1990 onwards (through 2026)
excluded_items.url_pattern: https://www.masjidtucson.org/publications/books/sp/{YYYY}/{mmm}/pageN.html for YYYY > 1990 or (YYYY=1990 AND mmm > mar)

excluded_items.title: submission.org content
excluded_items.reason: Anonymous community editors; site self-describes as 'not owned, maintained, managed or operated by any kind of legal organizations or organized groups'

excluded_items.title: 19.org content
excluded_items.reason: Edip Yuksel platform; articles ABOUT Khalifa are secondary attribution, Yuksel's own writing is post-Khalifa-community

deferred_items.title: Khalifa Friday sermons (1985-1989)
deferred_items.evidence: Multiple YouTube videos under 'Dr. Rashad Khalifa Friday Sermons 1987-1989'; submission.ws hosts a 50-session study-session index with detailed summaries but not full transcripts
deferred_items.reason_deferred: No full text transcripts available on canonical sites. Requires a separate STT (Whisper) session to convert audio to text. Defer to a future corpus-expansion session, not the initial scrape.

deferred_items.title: Khalifa's translation footnotes (standalone export)
deferred_items.reason_deferred: Need to verify whether these are already captured in the Neo4j Verse.text property. If yes, skip; if no, add as a separate extraction step.

totals.url_total: ≈480 source URLs (38 appendices + 1 intro + 92 QHI items + 57 VP items + 36 CS items + 256 SP pages)
totals.estimated_size_mb: ≈4 MB of pure-text Markdown after extraction (excluding PDF binaries which sum to ≈80 MB on disk)
